Jupuary 2025
Welcome to the Jupiverse

The friendliest and largest decentralized community and platform

This Jupuary, we’re introducing something special! Millions of users will receive NFT vouchers worth 1000 JUP. These vouchers can be easily redeemed for JUP tokens by connecting your wallet on our platform.

Join us!

To redeem your NFT voucher for 1000 JUP, connect your wallet and follow the instructions.

Voucher claims will remain open until April 30th, 2025. Don’t miss out!
